revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Year categories]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: append category metadata
revision.text: [[Category:redirect categories]]redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata de]] [[de:Category:Person (10. Jahrhundert)]] [[ab:Category:10-тәи ашәышықәсазы инхоз ауаа]] [[af:Category:Mense in die 10de eeu]] [[ar:Category:أشخاص في القرن 10]] [[az:Category:X əsr şəxsləri]] [[ba:Category:X быуат шәхестәре]] [[be_x_old:Category:Асобы X стагодзьдзя]] [[be:Category:Постаці X стагоддзя]] [[bn:Category:১০ম শতাব্দীর ব্যক্তি]] [[ca:Category:Biografies del segle X]] [[commons:Category:People in the 10th century]] [[cs:Category:Lidé 10. století]] [[cv:Category:X ĕмĕрти пайăр çынсем]] [[cy:Category:Pobl y 10fed ganrif]] [[da:Category:Personer i 900-tallet]] [[el:Category:Πρόσωπα του 10ου αιώνα]] [[eo:Category:Homoj de la 10-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Personas del siglo X]] [[eu:Category:X. mendeko biografiak]] [[fa:Category:اهالی سده ۱۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité du Xe siècle]] [[he:Category:אישים שחיו במאה ה-10]] [[hu:Category:10. századi személyek]] [[hy:Category:10-րդ դարի մարդիկ]] [[id:Category:Tokoh abad ke-10]] [[it:Category:Persone del X secolo]] [[ja:Category:10世紀の人物]] [[ka:Category:X საუკუნის ადამიანები]] [[ko:Category:10세기 사람]] [[ku:Category:Kesên sedsala 10an]] [[mk:Category:Луѓе од 10 век]] [[mn:Category:10-р зууны хүн]] [[nl:Category:Persoon in de 10e eeuw]] [[nn:Category:Folk frå 900-talet]] [[no:Category:Personer på 900-tallet]] [[oc:Category:Personalitat del sègle X]] [[pl:Category:Biografie X wieku]] [[pt:Category:Pessoas do século X]] [[ro:Category:Oameni din secolul al X-lea]] [[ru:Category:Персоналии X века]] [[sco:Category:10t-century fowk]] [[simple:Category:10th-century people]] [[sl:Category:Ljudje v 10. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Personer under 900-talet]] [[ta:Category:10-ஆம் நூற்றாண்டு மக்கள்]] [[tg:Category:Шахсиятҳои асри X]] [[th:Category:บุคคลในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 10]] [[tr:Category:10. yüzyıl kişileri]] [[tt:Category:X гасыр шәхесләре]] [[uk:Category:Персоналії X століття]] [[ur:Category:دسویں صدی کی شخصیات]] [[vi:Category:Người thế kỷ 10]] [[zh:Category:10世纪人物]] This category was confirmed from de→Wikidata links on [[Category:10th-century_deaths]].

redirect

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀の人物|10|10}} {{commons cat multi|People in the 10th century}} [[10世紀]] ([[:Category:10世紀生|生まれ]]、または[[:Category:10世紀没|没]])の人物のカテゴリ。 {{see also|en:Category:10th-century people}}
{{デフォルトソート:10せいきのしんふつ}}
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Redirect categories
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "[[be_x_old:" to "[[sn:be_x_old:"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Text replacement - "]].↵" to " "
Adding [[Category:undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[simple:" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:qq]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6926921)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

Jahrhundert)]] [[el:Category:Πρόσωπα του 10ου αιώνα]] [[en:Category:10th-century people]] [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[eo:Category:Homoj de la 10-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Personas del siglo X]] [[eu:Category:X. mendeko biografiak]] [[fa:Category:اهالی سده ۱۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité du Xe siècle]] [[he:Category:אישים שחיו במאה ה-10]] [[hu:Category:10. századi személyek]] [[hy:Category:10-րդ դարի մարդիկ]] [[id:Category:Tokoh abad ke-10]] [[it:Category:Persone del X secolo]] [[ja:Category:10世紀の人物]] [[ka:Category:X საუკუნის ადამიანები]] [[ko:Category:10세기 사람]] [[ku:Category:Kesên sedsala 10an]] [[mk:Category:Луѓе од 10 век]] [[mn:Category:10-р зууны хүн]] [[nl:Category:Persoon in de 10e eeuw]] [[nn:Category:Folk frå 900-talet]] [[no:Category:Personer på 900-tallet]] [[oc:Category:Personalitat del sègle X]] [[pl:Category:Biografie X wieku]] [[pt:Category:Pessoas do século X]] [[ro:Category:Oameni din secolul al X-lea]] [[ru:Category:Персоналии X века]] [[sco:Category:10t-century fowk]] [[simple:Category:10th-century people]] [[sl:Category:Ljudje v 10. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Personer under 900-talet]] [[ta:Category:10-ஆம் நூற்றாண்டு மக்கள்]] [[tg:Category:Шахсиятҳои асри X]] [[th:Category:บุคคลในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 10]] [[tr:Category:10. yüzyıl kişileri]] [[tt:Category:X гасыр шәхесләре]] [[uk:Category:Персоналії X століття]] [[ur:Category:دسویں صدی کی شخصیات]] [[vi:Category:Người thế kỷ 10]] [[zh:Category:10世纪人物]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTbe_x_old:Category:Асобы X стагодзьдзя]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]
